privileged_info_summary: The task asks the agent to configure the TiddlyWiki identity without using external datasets, relying solely on synthetic Kafka-related tiddlers injected via setup_task.sh. The expected site title ('Kafka Docs'), site subtitle ('Event Streaming Platform Reference'), default tiddlers ('[[Kafka Knowledge Base]]'), homepage title ('Kafka Knowledge Base'), and button action ('tm-new-tiddler') are explicitly defined in the task description and checked in verifier.py/export_result.sh.
